business_question: How does reimbursement performance vary across inpatient, outpatient, and emergency services?
business_context: Finance teams need visibility into service-line profitability.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    service_type,
    SUM(claim_amount) AS total_claim_amount,
    SUM(approved_amount) AS approved_amount,
    ROUND(
        SUM(approved_amount) * 100.0 /
        SUM(claim_amount), 2
    ) AS reimbursement_rate_pct
FROM fact_claims
GROUP BY service_type
ORDER BY reimbursement_rate_pct DESC;
